416.issue_title: Epic: Installable Wheel / Standalone MCP Server (phase-gate-mcp)

385.issue_title: Package Identity & Rename PGMCP Entry Point

cycles.name: C_TEST_DECOUPLE

deliverables.description: tests/ files use get_default_server_root() instead of .phase-gate

cycles.exit_criteria: All tests remain green and static analysis passes.

cycles.name: C_ARCH_FOUNDATION

deliverables.description: mcp_server/config/settings.py includes new path properties and .pgmcp default
mcp_server/assets/ contains config and templates directories

cycles.exit_criteria: Settings DI is strictly enforced and test suite dynamically switches to .pgmcp.

cycles.name: C_LOADER_PROBES

deliverables.description: test helpers updated to use assets/config

cycles.exit_criteria: Legacy probes are completely removed and tests pass using strict DI.

cycles.name: C_CLI_INIT

deliverables.description: pyproject.toml registers assets package data and pgmcp script
CLI fails-fast with explicit error if .pgmcp is missing and --init is not provided

cycles.exit_criteria: pgmcp --init successfully populates the workspace and gracefully handles absence of init.

cycles.name: C_WORKSPACE_MIGRATION

deliverables.description: CI/CD and VS Code configurations are updated for the new path

cycles.exit_criteria: Project workspace migration is fully complete.
